page_hero.title: Our Products
page_hero.subtitle: High-performance capacitor solutions engineered for reliability, precision, and longevity.

custom.title: Need something specific?
body: Standard products don't always fit unique challenges. Our engineering team works directly with you to design capacitor solutions built to your exact specifications — voltage, capacitance, form factor, temperature rating, and more.
From prototype to production, we support every stage of your product development with responsive technical expertise.

features.title: Custom Specifications
features.body: Any voltage, capacitance, or form factor. We design to your datasheet, not the other way around.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.body: Prototype samples in weeks, not months. We move fast without cutting corners on quality.

cta.title: Ready to order or get a quote?
cta.body: Contact our team with your specifications and we'll respond within one business day.
